Fort Sprite

Mark each sprite as not found, extracted, or mastered. Progress is saved on this device.

rare

Water

Restores shields while you and nearby teammates are in water.

rare

Earth

Increases your chance of finding rare items in chests.

rare

Fire

Triggers a fiery explosion after you deal enough enemy damage.

epic

Duck

Restores shields when you emote or jam.

epic

Ghost

Makes you temporarily invisible while reloading.

legendary

Dream

Gives a random item each level, with legendary loot at Level 5.

epic

Demon

Grants health and shields after an elimination.

legendary

Punk

Adds random chest bonuses, including stronger loot and effects.

epic

King

Increases pickaxe damage.

mythic

Zero Point

Spawns a Shield Bubble Jr. whenever you heal yourself.

rare

Track this extracted variant in your permanent Sprite collection.
